plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Attendance System to access your camera for attendance selfies.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Attendance System to access your microphone.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Attendance System to use your location for attendance check-in and check-out.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Attendance System to use your location for attendance check-in and check-out.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Attendance System to use your location to verify your attendance location.
